      ClimatePartner certified

      The ClimatePartner certified product label confirms that a product meets the requirements for the five steps in climate action including calculating carbon footprints, setting reduction targets, implementing reductions, financing climate projects and communicating transparently to continuously reducing emissions.

      Brand PocBuds
      Color Black
      Ear Placement Over Ear
      Form Factor Over Ear
      Impedance 32 Ohms

      About this item

      • 80hrs Playtime & Digital Charging Case: Each ear buds offers up to 8 hours of listening time on a single charge, allowing you to enjoy a total of 80 hours of music by taking turns with the charging case. Wireless earbuds feature a dual LED digital display that provides real-time battery status. Easily monitor the remaining power and plan your usage accordingly. Bluetooth headphones support wired charging with a Type-C cable and wireless charging via Qi-certified charging pad (not included)
      • Hi-Fi Sound Quality & HD Voice Technology: Bluetooth earbuds incorporate 13mm double-layer diaphragm drivers, delivering sound with strong bass, clear mids, and bright treble. Experience high-fidelity sound reproduction that brings every note and detail to life, enhancing your music listening experience. The built-in microphones ensure high-quality call performance by isolating your voice from surrounding noise. Enjoy uninterrupted conversations with superior clarity, regardless of your location
      • One Button Control & Auto On/Connect: Manage your music, adjust volume, and answer calls effortlessly with the wireless headphones' one-button control. Enjoy hassle-free control right at your fingertips. Over-ear earbuds automatically power on and connect to your device when taken out of the charging case. Seamlessly pair and start enjoying your favorite content instantly. They are compatible with most Bluetooth-enabled devices, including smartphones, TVs, computers, laptops, and smartwatches
      • Bluetooth 5.3 & Multi Using Mode: Stay connected to your device with confidence, thanks to the advanced Bluetooth 5.3 capability of PocBuds earbuds. Ensures a strong, continuous connection within a range of up to 30ft from the paired device. It greatly improves transmission speed, providing you with a low-latency listening experience. The wireless earphones offer both binaural mode for stereo surround sound and mono mode allowing you to enjoy music with either the left or right earpiece alone
      • Design for Sports & IPX7 Sweat-resistant: Bluetooth earphones are the result of years of research aimed at improving people's wearing experience based on thousands of ear canal. Designed with flexible and soft ear hooks, earbuds wireless bluetooth fit perfectly in your ears and stay focused on your exercise routine without worrying about falling out. To provide you with customized comfort, 3 multiple sizes of ear tips are available. IPX7 waterproof can keep the beat going even with a little rain
      › See more product details

        ClimeCo Certified

        ClimeCo Certified

        ClimeCo certifies products whose carbon emissions have been assessed, verified, decarbonized, and are on a committed path towards continual emissions reductions. Companies may pursue emissions reductions for products through various means such as sustainable manufacturing practices, supply chain sustainability, raw materials innovation, renewable energy use, insetting, sustainable transportation and packaging.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these wireless earbuds reliable and comfortable, noting they fit well over the ear and are easy to pair with devices. The sound quality is good, and customers appreciate the long-lasting battery that comes fully charged. They consider the earbuds good value for money, with one customer specifically mentioning the great sound for the price.

      Previous slide

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      SOUND QUALITY + AFFORDABLE PRICING = GREAT PURCHASE
      I’ve gone through a plethora of wireless earbuds. From very expensive brands, to very reasonable and affordable prices. I used to have a thick stack of receipts because I would purchase the warranty for each wireless earbud and return it and get a different one every time. However these (PocBuds T60), is by far, hands down, the best I’ve purchased thus far. The quality of sound + affordable pricing, is unmatched. The bass sounds decent, but full. The mids and tremble is clear, crisp and smooth. Whether you’re listening to live band music (you can hear every instrument), studio music, or listening to a podcast, it has all around great sound. Zero delay when watching videos or movies. I would highly recommend anyone to purchase these. **Update** After using these PocBuds wireless earbuds, I started to get an allergic reaction. I think it’s from the rubber material that wraps around the ear. I still feel the same way as I did above even after the allergic reaction because that has nothing to do with the sound quality of this product. Hoping for a refund though. I can give it to one my kids.
      MoreHide

      • Dave Puzz
        5.0 out of 5 stars PocBuds are a great value for the $$$$
        Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026
        Style: StandardColor: OliveVerified Purchase
        These are some great buds.
        Length of operating time is adequate. Comfortable fit and easy to use.
        Great value for the cost.
        Sound quality is right up there with the expensive models.
        Easy to use volume control. Left to decrease, right to increase. Hold to disconnect.

      • Tam
        5.0 out of 5 stars IMPRESSED
        Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026
        Style: StandardColor: BlackVerified Purchase
        I don't write a lot of reviews, but felt these were definitely worthy. First thing I noticed was the weight of the case. Nice, not cheap feeling. Popped the buds into my my ears and and English (not asain) voice said 'pairing'. Just like that. No continued bumping to find the English settings, EASILY pairing to my phone - Samsung Z Fold 5. And the sound, Impressive. Not tinny, but based, and I could barely hear the noises around me. I cant speak to battery life just yet - but I did wear them for about an hour last night with a drain of only 1%. Very Comfortable. I have tiny ears and these settle in, on and around my ears well. Very IMPRESSIVE for being $25. I've learned over time, No one needs to pay an outrageous amount of cash for good earbuds unless you need to have your name brand fix. These are just as GOOD as the Bose I once owned.

        5.0 out of 5 stars Better than expected for the price
        Reviewed in the United States on March 13, 2026
        Style: StandardColor: BeigeVerified Purchase
        These are really nice ear buds, battery life last at least 7 hours of music play. Sounds great on calls as well as listening to music. They are comfortable for long periods of wear and the price is reasonable.

      • Brent Henry
        4.0 out of 5 stars 3 years of testing! Good product!
        Reviewed in the United States on November 23, 2025
        Style: StandardColor: BlackVerified Purchase
        This is the 2nd set I’ve ordered. The first set worked flawlessly with my Android as well as when I switched to an iPhone. No problems with Bluetooth connectivity. I was skeptical due to the price, but they exceeded my expectations. Longevity was there. I wore these to the gym 4 days a week for 3 years. Finally after 3 years, one of the over the ear rubber brackets has broken. I immediately ordered another pair. The charging case as well as the buds hold a charge for several days. They are secure on the ear with great sound and are extremely comfortable. Comes with USB to C charging cable. There is one simple button on the each bud with the following functions:

        Update: I recently returned the 2nd set. The left ear bud would not charge completely. I think that may have been a charger issue.

        Bud Button Functions:
        Power On/Off - Hold until she says power off or power on.
        Left + Right Bud - One click song pause
        Left + Right Bud - Double click to skip to the next song.
        Volume - Hold Left Bud to lower + Hold Right Bud to raise.
        Left + Right - 4 clicks to talk to smart phone assistant (Siri). Smart assistant will pop up on your phone as well.
        Read more
        Brent Henry
        4.0 out of 5 stars
        3 years of testing! Good product!

        Reviewed in the United States on November 23, 2025
        This is the 2nd set I’ve ordered. The first set worked flawlessly with my Android as well as when I switched to an iPhone. No problems with Bluetooth connectivity. I was skeptical due to the price, but they exceeded my expectations. Longevity was there. I wore these to the gym 4 days a week for 3 years.       • Amazon Customer
        5.0 out of 5 stars These are truly fantastic!
        Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026
        Style: StandardColor: OliveVerified Purchase
        Seriously, these are just as good as the "high priced" ones. I have used these to train for many marathons over the past few years and they performed flawlessly and sound great. They even survived a cycle through the washing machine and worked after they dried out (I don't recommend that though lol). Really though, these are super comfortable, they stay in place, they are durable, the battery lasts a long, long time. If you store them in the case, and charge the case for an hour once every few weeks they'll never go dead on you. For the price, give them a try before spending $200 on another pair. I guarantee you'll keep these and pocket the $200.
        Read more
        Helpful
         Report
      • Jeff's Custom Computers
        5.0 out of 5 stars Best wireless headphones I've ever had
        Reviewed in the United States on December 27, 2025
        Style: StandardColor: BlackVerified Purchase
        I've gone through about 20 different headsets ever since the original airpods came out. I run in them, work from home listening to podcasts, take phone calls with them and sometimes fall asleep with them. They're basically in my ear for half the day every day. I've had headsets that range from $10 to $250. Doesn't matter if you get a $10 pair or if you get a $250 pair. They usually all will have sound distortion eventually. I've spent probably $600 on airpods and one of them will get messed up the first 6. Or you'll loose one or forgot you put it in your pocket and find it in the laundry later. Even with the most expensive ones they won't last.

        But these do.

        I've been using exclusively only these for 6 months. I was a little against having the over-the-ear cuz I'm used to having the little buds. But they're great. It doesn't bother me having it over the ear and they have never fallen out even on trail running. The sound quality is great. The bass is great. The battery life is amazing. Legitimately I can listen to them for 8 hours straight. A lot of the cheaper headphones have terrible microphones in them but everybody that I talk to on the phone says these are great. The case also lasts a long time. I only charge this once a week with a type c charger for 1 hour and I probably use it 60 hours for the week. The range is fantastic. I can move anywhere in my house even without my phone and it doesn't skip. The adjustable small medium large tips is awesome cuz I just put on what feels the best when I got it. And the most impressive thing was one of these did go through the wash and they dryer and I was upset because I really love them. And it still worked! Insane. These are crazy cheap. I got them for like $25. There's no dumb touch controls that you accidentally will do a gesture or pause. Play next while you take them out. It's an actual physical button that has a good click to it and you can double tap them for play pause next, or pick up a phone call. The only cons are if you fall asleep with them, they're not the most comfortable because the over-the-ear can press on the side of your head if you're a side sleeper. Also the case is huge. Like it's almost three times size of an airpod's case. But it has wireless charging and the battery for the headphones will last so long I don't even put them in the case. I take them out of my ear and I put them in my pocket without the case and they'll last all day so the case just stays by my bed and I just charge them once a day when I fall asleep. So I don't need to take the case around with me unless I'm doing an overnight somewhere. The case is cool because it tells me how much battery life I have left and updates the charge rate percentage level while charging.

        So in summary, these are probably the most reliable durable longest battery headphones that sound great that you can get for this price that have a great microphone and connectivity range.
        Read more
        42 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report

      Product Summary: PocBuds Bluetooth Headphones Wireless Earbuds 80hrs Playtime Wireless Charging Case Digital Display Sports Ear Buds with Earhook Deep Bass IPX7 Waterproof Over-Ear Earphones for TV Phone Laptop Black

      From PocBuds

      4.4 out of 5 stars, 20,488 ratings

      Customer reviews

      10K+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: THB 1,250.74 5% Savings

      List Price: THB 1,316.59

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • 80hrs Playtime & Digital Charging Case: Each ear buds offers up to 8 hours of listening time on a single charge, allowing you to enjoy a total of 80 hours of music by taking turns with the charging case. Wireless earbuds feature a dual LED digital display that provides real-time battery status. Easily monitor the remaining power and plan your usage accordingly. Bluetooth headphones support wired charging with a Type-C cable and wireless charging via Qi-certified charging pad (not included)
      • Hi-Fi Sound Quality & HD Voice Technology: Bluetooth earbuds incorporate 13mm double-layer diaphragm drivers, delivering sound with strong bass, clear mids, and bright treble. Experience high-fidelity sound reproduction that brings every note and detail to life, enhancing your music listening experience. The built-in microphones ensure high-quality call performance by isolating your voice from surrounding noise. Enjoy uninterrupted conversations with superior clarity, regardless of your location
      • One Button Control & Auto On/Connect: Manage your music, adjust volume, and answer calls effortlessly with the wireless headphones' one-button control. Enjoy hassle-free control right at your fingertips. Over-ear earbuds automatically power on and connect to your device when taken out of the charging case. Seamlessly pair and start enjoying your favorite content instantly. They are compatible with most Bluetooth-enabled devices, including smartphones, TVs, computers, laptops, and smartwatches
      • Bluetooth 5.3 & Multi Using Mode: Stay connected to your device with confidence, thanks to the advanced Bluetooth 5.3 capability of PocBuds earbuds. Ensures a strong, continuous connection within a range of up to 30ft from the paired device. It greatly improves transmission speed, providing you with a low-latency listening experience. The wireless earphones offer both binaural mode for stereo surround sound and mono mode allowing you to enjoy music with either the left or right earpiece alone
      • Design for Sports & IPX7 Sweat-resistant: Bluetooth earphones are the result of years of research aimed at improving people's wearing experience based on thousands of ear canal. Designed with flexible and soft ear hooks, earbuds wireless bluetooth fit perfectly in your ears and stay focused on your exercise routine without worrying about falling out. To provide you with customized comfort, 3 multiple sizes of ear tips are available. IPX7 waterproof can keep the beat going even with a little rain

      Product Description

      80 Hours Playtime & Dual LED Displays: On a single charge, each earbud has up to 8 hours of music time. Earbud & in-ear headphones get a total of 80 hours of uninterrupted music playback with additional charging in the charging case. Built-in dual LED power display make it more clear to show the remaining battery of the case in real-time and the charging status of headphones wireless bluetooth. Say goodbye to frequent recharging and enjoy uninterrupted music for extended periods to keep you immersed in your favorite tunes throughout the day. Wireless Charging & USB Type-C Charge: Say goodbye to tangled cables and enjoy the convenience of wireless charging for audifonos bluetooth inalambricos. Simply place them on a compatible charging pad, and they will charge effortlessly. Equipped with a USB Type-C port, our earphones wireless offer fast and efficient charging. You can use various charging sources, such as power banks, laptops, or wall adapters, for quick replenishment. Bluetooth 5.3 Technology & Wide Compatibility: With upgraded Bluetooth 5.3 version, your wireless headphones bluetooth can get a faster transfer speed and a more stable connection, sync audio and video without delay, widely compatible with smartphones, TV, computer, Laptop, smart watch etc,. One Button Control: With physical button on the buds, you can easily answer/reject/end phone calls or control music (pause/play, switch next/previous song, decrease/increase volume) or activate voice assistant. All operations at your fingertip, easy and simple even for beginners of wireless earbuds with earhooks. Mono & Binaural Modes: The over ear bluetooth headphones can not only work together, but also work alone. Switch to single earbud mode when making calls or listening to music while still maintaining awareness of the world around you. You can also give one wireless ear buds to your partner, share a song or movie with him/her at the same time.
